questionHtml: Sketch the complementary strand to complete the section of a DNA diagram.
markschemeHtml:
a. correct base sequence: T, G, A;

b. strand drawn anti-parallel;

c. correct shapes used;

Award [2 max] if bonds are not from the correct carbon or if the nucleotides are not joined.

meta.title: Sketch the complementary strand to complete the section of a DNA diagram.
breadcrumbLabels: A1.2.6. DNA as a double helix made of two antiparallel strands of nucleotides with two strands linked by hydrogen bonding between complementary base pairs
